mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS artwork_id, a.artwork_no, a.artist_id, ap.artist_name, COALESCE(al.level_name, '签约艺术家') AS artist_level_name, a.title, a.category, a.style, a.width_cm, a.height_cm, a.depth_cm, a.material, a.creation_year, a.description, a.base_price, a.current_price, a.price_status, a.online_days, a.favorite_count, a.view_count, a.sale_mode, a.support_group_buy, a.support_resale, a.status, ( SELECT am.media_url FROM artwork_media am WHERE am.artwork_id = a.id ORDER BY am.is_main DESC, am.sort_no ASC, am.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS cover_url, apr.online_days_weight, apr.follow_count_weight, apr.artist_float_min, apr.artist_float_max, apr.platform_max_growth_rate, apr.manual_adjust_rate FROM artwork a INNER JOIN artist_profile ap ON ap.id = a.artist_id LEFT JOIN artist_level al ON al.id = ap.level_id LEFT JOIN artwork_price_rule apr ON apr.artwork_id = a.id WHERE a.id = #{artworkId} LIMIT 1
SELECT media_type, media_url, sort_no, is_main FROM artwork_media WHERE artwork_id = #{artworkId} ORDER BY is_main DESC, sort_no ASC, id ASC
